title: Benchwright Console Table
summary: A six-legged console with two center drawers flanked by open shelves on both sides, a breadboard-slat top, and a plywood back panel closing the whole thing in.
description:
Six 2x4 legs — two at each end, two in the center flanking the drawer bay — carry two full-length 1x12 shelves, with trim framing the front, back, and sides of each shelf opening. The center bay gets its own drawer guides, including a center divider guide that splits it for two stacked drawers, while the two end bays stay open as shelves.

The top is built from six 1x3 boards running front to back, capped on both ends with breadboard pieces **cut to fit** rather than a fixed length — measure the actual top assembly before cutting the breadboard ends, since board width variance changes the fit. A 1/4" plywood back panel closes the whole unit in, spanning the full width and height.

The two drawers are simple boxes — plywood bottoms, 1x4 sides and fronts/backs — sized to run on the center guides, with pulls added once they're hung.

materials.name: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

cutList.note: Cut to fit the assembled top.

steps.title: Build the shelf frames
steps.body: Attach the shelf trim to the front, back, and sides of both shelves, then join the shelves to the six legs and side aprons.

steps.title: Add the drawer guides
steps.body: Attach the two side drawer guides and the center drawer guide inside the center bay, level with the shelf.

steps.title: Attach the back panel
steps.body: Nail the plywood back panel across the full width and height of the frame.

steps.title: Build and attach the top
steps.body: Join the six top boards edge to edge, measure the assembly, and cut the breadboard ends to fit before attaching.

steps.title: Build the drawers
steps.body: Assemble the two drawer boxes from the sides, front/back, and plywood bottoms, then attach the drawer faces and fit to run on the guides.

steps.title: Add hardware and finish
steps.body: Attach drawer knobs, then sand and apply primer and paint, or stain and poly.
materials: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

unresolvedImages.alt: Benchwright console table with two drawers and open shelves
